title: Package the M365 standalone pack as a conformant marketplace bundle
execution_plan_ref: Operations/EXECUTION_PLAN.md § Initiative: M365 marketplace bundle packaging and conformance

principles: truthful M365-owned pack distribution and release artifact boundaries
fail-closed marketplace trust, signature, and conformance posture
self-service packaging that does not require UCP repo authority drift
anti_alignment: Does NOT redesign UCP-side Marketplace UI or lifecycle gating.
Does NOT weaken service-mode auth or actor-identity rules.
Does NOT claim bundle packaging is complete without a real bundle artifact.

user_stated_requirements: first do the formal plan per AGENTS.md rules process and governance
the M365 integration pack should be correctly packaged for the marketplace
ensure all prompts for the plans are following our formal prompt template
intent_capture.intent_verification: R1 through R7 capture the pack-side work required so M365 can emit a real marketplace bundle instead of only a runtime-owned source tree.

objective: Package the standalone ucp_m365_pack surface in this repo as a conformant marketplace bundle that UCP can later consume as a real marketplace artifact.
current_state: This repo owns the authoritative standalone UCP-facing pack source in src/ucp_m365_pack/, but there is no manifest.json, payload.tar.gz, signatures, evidence folder, or final .ucp.tar.gz bundle artifact.
target_state: This repo produces a conformant marketplace bundle with manifest, payload, signatures, evidence, and one final bundle artifact that validates against the pack manifest and bundle specs.

in_scope: define the canonical M365 marketplace bundle packaging contract
build the concrete bundle structure for ucp_m365_pack
emit manifest, payload, signatures, and evidence artifacts
run conformance validation over the packaged artifact
update commercialization and governance surfaces to truthfully describe the packaged bundle
out_of_scope: sibling UCP repo install or UI consumption changes
new M365 persona or Graph capability work
file_denylist: Any path not listed in the allowlist
scope.scope_fence_rule: Stop and re-scope if the packaging work requires UCP-side Marketplace/UI changes or files outside the allowlist.

requirements.description: One governed package must define the M365 bundle structure, pack identity, compatibility, entitlement, and evidence expectations.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: The package truthfully defines the required manifest, payload, signatures, evidence, and final bundle identity.
requirements.user_intent_trace: the M365 integration pack should be correctly packaged for the marketplace

requirements.description: A real manifest.json conforming to the pack manifest schema must exist for the M365 pack bundle.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: The packaged artifact includes a concrete manifest.json with the required pack identity, compatibility, entitlement, and entrypoint fields.

requirements.description: A real payload.tar.gz must contain the standalone ucp_m365_pack runtime surface and required setup assets.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: The packaged artifact includes a self-contained payload archive built from the standalone pack surface.
requirements.user_intent_trace: the M365 integration pack should be correctly packaged for the marketplace

requirements.description: The bundle must include signatures and evidence artifacts required by the bundle spec.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: signatures and evidence material exist concretely and are referenced truthfully.

requirements.description: One final .ucp.tar.gz artifact must be produced for the M365 pack.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: The bundle assembly emits one final distributable marketplace pack artifact.
requirements.user_intent_trace: the M365 integration pack should be correctly packaged for the marketplace

requirements.description: The packaged artifact must validate against the declared contract and fail closed when incomplete.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Conformance validation passes or produces explicit fail-closed reasons.

requirements.description: Plan, prompt, action log, execution plan, and project file index must be synchronized truthfully.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Plan schema passes, prompt artifacts validate, project file index is updated, and git diff --check is clean.

tasks.name: Lock the packaging contract
tasks.description: Publish the governed package, prompt pair, notebook evidence, and commercialization note for the bundle boundary.
exit_criteria: The package explicitly defines manifest, payload, signatures, evidence, and final bundle identity.
The package stays in this repo and does not drift into UCP-side consumption work.

tasks.name: Build manifest and payload
tasks.description: Create the concrete manifest.json, payload.tar.gz, and bundle-layout source tree for ucp_m365_pack.
exit_criteria: The bundle has a concrete manifest.json.
The bundle has a self-contained payload.tar.gz.
tasks.validation_command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
assert Path('dist/m365_pack/manifest.json').is_file()
assert Path('dist/m365_pack/payload.tar.gz').is_file()
print('bundle layout ok')
PY

tasks.name: Add signatures and evidence
tasks.description: Create signatures and evidence artifacts required by the bundle spec.
tasks.validation_command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
required = [
    'dist/m365_pack/signatures/manifest.sig',
    'dist/m365_pack/signatures/payload.sig',
    'dist/m365_pack/evidence/conformance.json',
    'dist/m365_pack/evidence/sbom.json',
]
for path in required:
    assert Path(path).is_file(), path
print('trust material ok')
PY

tasks.name: Assemble the final marketplace bundle
tasks.validation_command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
assert Path('dist/m365_pack/com.smarthaus.m365-1.0.0.ucp.tar.gz').is_file()
print('final bundle ok')
PY

tasks.name: Run conformance validation
tasks.description: Validate the packaged artifact and capture diagnostic proof.
exit_criteria: conformance validation passes or fails closed explicitly
tasks.implementation_notes: The executed phase must use the real validator once implemented; this planning slice only locks the required gate.

tasks.name: Close governance truthfully
tasks.description: Synchronize action log, execution plan, project file index, and plan status.

checks.name: Packaging contract explicit
checks.description: The package must explicitly define manifest, payload, signatures, evidence, and final bundle identity.
checks.pass_criteria: The contract terms are explicitly present.

checks.name: Plan schema validates
checks.description: The YAML plan conforms to the master plan schema.
checks.validation_command: /Users/smarthaus/Projects/GitHub/UCP/.venv/bin/python -c "import json, pathlib, yaml; from jsonschema import Draft202012Validator as V; schema=json.loads(pathlib.Path('/Users/smarthaus/Projects/GitHub/UCP/agent_governance/PLAN_TEMPLATE_SCHEMA.json').read_text()); data=yaml.safe_load(pathlib.Path('plans/m365-marketplace-bundle-packaging-conformance/m365-marketplace-bundle-packaging-conformance.yaml').read_text()); V(schema).validate(data); print('plan schema ok')"
checks.pass_criteria: The validator prints plan schema ok.

checks.name: Prompt artifacts validate
checks.description: The detailed and kickoff prompts satisfy the formal prompt contract.
checks.validation_command:
PYTHONPATH=/Users/smarthaus/Projects/GitHub/UCP/src /Users/smarthaus/Projects/GitHub/UCP/.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
from ucp.governance.artifact_contracts import validate_prompt_artifact
root = Path('/Users/smarthaus/Projects/GitHub/M365')
for path in [
    'docs/prompts/codex-m365-marketplace-bundle-packaging-conformance.md',
    'docs/prompts/codex-m365-marketplace-bundle-packaging-conformance-prompt.txt',
]:
    verdict = validate_prompt_artifact(artifact_path=path, root=root)
    assert verdict['valid'] is True, verdict
print('prompt validation ok')
PY
checks.pass_criteria: The validator prints prompt validation ok.

checks.name: Project file index updated
checks.description: The new governed artifacts are indexed.
checks.pass_criteria: The new workstream artifacts appear in the project file index.

decision.go_rule: All checks pass and the package truthfully defines the bundle/conformance workstream.
decision.no_go_rule: Any check fails or the package leaves bundle packaging implicit.

no_go_triggers: The package claims marketplace conformance without a real bundle artifact.
The package drifts into UCP-side consumption work.
The package treats signatures or evidence as optional.

artifacts.validation: YAML authority for the governed M365-side workstream.
JSON mirror of the governed M365-side workstream.
Detailed prompt follows the formal MATHS prompt structure.
Kickoff prompt points to the detailed prompt and plan reference.
Notebook-backed governance evidence for the planning package.
Generated verification payload for the planning package.

environment.pre_notebook_check: Planning package creation is governance-only. Bundle packaging execution must stay inside this repo allowlist and the M365-owned standalone pack surface.

options_considered.description: Keep the standalone source tree and let UCP continue installing from transitional owner-repo seed materialization.
cons: Cannot honestly satisfy the intended installation model.

options_considered.description: Package the standalone M365 pack as a real marketplace bundle with manifest, payload, signatures, evidence, and final distributable artifact.
pros: Matches the declared bundle and manifest specs.
Becomes the correct source-of-truth for UCP consumption.
cons: Requires real packaging and conformance work.

implementation_approach.rationale: The runtime pack surface already exists in this repo. The missing boundary is the distributable marketplace artifact, not another runtime refactor.

rejected_rationale.A: It preserves the wrong distribution model and leaves UCP dependent on transitional seed materialization.

items.risk: the standalone runtime surface may still depend on UCP-internal assumptions that are not captured in a self-contained payload
items.mitigation: make bundle conformance fail closed and inventory any remaining host dependencies explicitly

items.risk: packaging work could stop at documentation instead of producing a real bundle artifact
items.mitigation: require concrete manifest, payload, signatures, evidence, and final bundle outputs in the requirements and gates

items.risk: trust material could be implied rather than generated
items.mitigation: require concrete signatures and evidence artifacts in the bundle structure

procedure: revert only the bounded packaging and conformance files in the allowlist
remove the generated bundle artifacts if the slice is withdrawn
update governance trackers to remove the draft workstream truthfully

task_checklist.evidence: governed package, prompt pair, notebook evidence, and commercialization note published
manifest, payload archive, and bundle-layout source tree built under dist/m365_pack
signatures and evidence artifacts created for the bundle spec
Operations governance trackers and project file index synchronized truthfully

validation_strategy: validate the M365 packaging YAML against ../UCP/agent_governance/PLAN_TEMPLATE_SCHEMA.json
validate the detailed and kickoff prompt artifacts through ucp.governance.artifact_contracts.validate_prompt_artifact using the UCP governance runtime
confirm Operations/PROJECT_FILE_INDEX.md includes the new governed artifacts

when_blocked.format: STATUS: BLOCKED / TASK: {id} / REASON: {desc} / MISSING: {list} / NEXT ALLOWED ACTION: {path}

agent_constraints: Do not touch files outside Section 5 file allowlist.
Do not drift into sibling UCP Marketplace or Integrations work.
Do not claim marketplace conformance without a real bundle artifact.
Do not treat signatures or evidence as optional in the final model.
Use .venv/bin/python for all Python commands when available.
